Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Understand the Goal Convert a raw Windows activity log into a process mining event log The output needs a Case ID Activity Name Timestamp and potentially other attributes I need to explain the logic behind Case Identification and Activity Naming

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Case Identification Strategy Strategy 1 Entire session as one case Too broad The user clearly does different things Strategy 2 By Application Doesnt work well Strategy 3 By Document File Partial fit but not perfect Strategy 4 By logical work unit task

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets refine Strategy 4 based on causal temporal narratives

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - PE
Text: Alternative Case 3 The final FOCUS on Quarterly Report could just be the end of Case 2 However they closed Document1 right before It looks like they finished the integration closed Document1 then started a new task Quarterly Report I will keep them separate

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Activity Naming Strategy Translate raw low level actions into higher level meaningful business process activities

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait the very first action is FOCUS on Quarterly Report but then they immediately FOCUS on Document1 This looks like they had Quarterly Report open but decided to work on Document1 instead Actually lets look closer

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Its highly likely Document1 is a scratchpad or draft notes file that feeds into the main Quarterly Report

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Therefore the ENTIRE process from 085950 to 090815 could logically be ONE CASE Authoring Quarterly Report

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets test this hypothesis If its one case

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait process mining cases can also be their individual sub tasks if they are well bounded

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Actually process analysts often look at logical work units Here the work unit is clearly producing the Quarterly Report

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets group them by Related Artifacts Topic Case 1 Working Draft Document1 and Associated Inputs Case 2 Quarterly Report Authoring

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Critique of Artifact Topic grouping This is excellent It tells a clear story

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Refining Activity Names Lets create a standardized mapping from raw actions to high level activities

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Self Correction on Activity Names Draft Content for Excel is weird Lets use Edit Content as a universal term for TYPING or differentiate Compose Text for Word Chrome Update Data for Excel

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Review against Key Objectives Data Transformation Done Case Identification Grouped into Data Gathering and Drafting Case 1 and Quarterly Report Authoring Case 2 This is logical and coherent Activity Naming Translated raw verbs into higher level names

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This is highly consistent and tells a great story
